summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StakeChess MVP - real-time chess platform with crypto staking. All core features tested successfully including authentication, game lobby, wallet functionality, leaderboard, and admin panel.

resolved_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 response
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added proper _id exclusion when fetching settings after insert

passed_tests: Landing page loads with black/gold theme
User registration flow with $100 USDT demo balance
Admin login with demo credentials (admin@stakechess.com / admin123)
Game lobby displays user stats and available games
Leaderboard shows players sorted by rating/wins/games with tab switching
Wallet page shows balances for USDT/BTC/ETH
Deposit and withdraw dialogs work correctly
All 12 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
